brief: Today's top stories include a US soldier killed in Iraq, a ferry sinking off Guyana with dozens missing, and Russia's massive missile attack on Kyiv, while papers focus on the effects of ChatGPT on writing and L2 instruction.
news_summary: A US soldier was killed during a controlled detonation of an Iranian drone in Iraq, as the US launches more airstrikes. A ferry carrying 133 people sank off Guyana, with 67 rescued and dozens missing. Russia battered Kyiv with one of the largest missile assaults of the war, and Trump arrived by helicopter to attend the World Cup final.
papers_summary: Research on ChatGPT revision reveals it tends to remove emphases in personal statements, while other papers examine pause patterns, noun phrase complexity in L2 writing, and academic networking in precarious transitions.

en.brief: Today's top stories include a US soldier killed in Iraq, a ferry sinking off Guyana with dozens missing, and Russia's massive missile attack on Kyiv, while papers focus on the effects of ChatGPT on writing and L2 instruction.

A ferry carrying 133 people sank off Guyana, with 67 rescued and dozens missing. Russia battered Kyiv with one of the largest missile assaults of the war, and Trump arrived by helicopter to attend the World Cup final.

zh.brief: 今日头条包括：身高不足1.2米的双胞胎姐妹为癌症预防提供关键线索；中国揭阳虐狗案引发全球舆论；K-pop突破封锁传入朝鲜；欧洲热浪下中国空调需求激增；姆巴佩领跑世界杯金靴之争；首次在宜居带类地行星发现大气层。国际方面，一名美军在伊拉克死亡，圭亚那渡轮沉没，俄罗斯大规模空袭基辅。
zh.news_summary: 中国新闻聚焦双胞胎姐妹的癌症预防研究、虐狗案舆论、K-pop在朝鲜传播、欧洲中国空调热、世界杯金靴竞争以及类地行星大气层发现。

todays_image.caption: Like the creeping spread of Polypremum procumbens across the ground, the Cyclospora parasite silently colonizes its victims until the agony hits like a sudden, brutal blow.
todays_image.title: Polypremum procumbens L.
